summary: Good sound capture of a solid 1986 California show with a decent, if not spectacular, setlist.
review: Both reviewers describe the concert as a good 1986 event and praise the tape’s sound quality, noting that the tapers captured the audio well despite the venue being played only twice. While the setlist isn’t hailed as exceptional, the overall performance is viewed positively and the recording is considered listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two reviews (3★ and 4★) give a modestly positive impression; sound quality is praised while the setlist is deemed average, leading to an overall rating just below four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers say the tape sounds real good and that the tapers got the sound right; no specific issues or flaws are mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Setlist not considered the best but overall solid; reviewers felt the show was a good representation of an ’86 event.
